OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector (comma-separated observable types to import).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector (ISO 8601 duration format).

TAXII2_CERT_PATH.description: Path to client certificate for mTLS authentication.

TAXII2_V21.description: Use TAXII 2.1 protocol (set to false for TAXII 2.0).

TAXII2_COLLECTIONS.description: Collections to poll (format: api_root.collection, or *. * for all).

TAXII2_INITIAL_HISTORY.description: Hours of history to fetch on first run.

TAXII2_VERIFY_SSL.description: Verify SSL certificates when connecting to the TAXII server.

TAXII2_ADD_CUSTOM_LABEL.description: Add a custom label to all imported objects.

TAXII2_CUSTOM_LABEL.description: Custom label value to add to imported objects.

TAXII2_FORCE_PATTERN_AS_NAME.description: Use indicator pattern as the indicator name.

TAXII2_FORCE_MULTIPLE_PATTERN_NAME.description: Name to use for indicators with multiple patterns.

TAXII2_STIX_CUSTOM_PROPERTY_TO_LABEL.description: Convert custom STIX properties to labels.

TAXII2_STIX_CUSTOM_PROPERTY.description: Custom STIX property name to convert to label.

TAXII2_ENABLE_URL_QUERY_LIMIT.description: Enable the query limit parameter in TAXII requests.

TAXII2_URL_QUERY_LIMIT.description: Maximum number of objects to request per TAXII query.

TAXII2_DETERMINE_X_OPENCTI_SCORE_BY_LABE.description: Determine the x_opencti_score based on indicator labels.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_HIGH_SCORE_LABELS.description: Comma-separated labels that trigger a high score.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_HIGH_SCORE.description: Score value assigned to indicators with high score labels.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_MEDIUM_SCORE_LABELS.description: Comma-separated labels that trigger a medium score.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_MEDIUM_SCORE.description: Score value assigned to indicators with medium score labels.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_LOW_SCORE_LABELS.description: Comma-separated labels that trigger a low score.

TAXII2_INDICATOR_LOW_SCORE.description: Score value assigned to indicators with low score labels.

TAXII2_CREATE_AUTHOR.description: Create an author identity for imported objects.

TAXII2_AUTHOR_RELIABILITY.description: Reliability level for the author identity.

TAXII2_EXCLUDE_SPECIFIC_LABELS.description: Enable exclusion of objects with specific labels.

TAXII2_LABELS_TO_EXCLUDE.description: Comma-separated labels to exclude from import.

TAXII2_CHARACTERS_TO_REPLACE_IN_LABEL.description: Comma-separated characters to replace in labels.

TAXII2_IGNORE_PATTERN_TYPES.description: Enable ignoring indicators with specific pattern types.

TAXII2_IGNORE_OBJECT_TYPES.description: Enable ignoring specific STIX object types.

TAXII2_OBJECT_TYPES_TO_IGNORE.description: Comma-separated STIX object types to ignore.

TAXII2_IGNORE_SPECIFIC_PATTERNS.description: Enable ignoring indicators with specific patterns.

TAXII2_SAVE_ORIGINAL_INDICATOR_ID_TO_NOT.description: Save original indicator ID as a note.

TAXII2_SAVE_ORIGINAL_INDICATOR_ID_ABSTRA.description: Abstract text for the note containing the original indicator ID.

TAXII2_CHANGE_REPORT_STATUS.description: Change the status of imported reports.

TAXII2_CHANGE_REPORT_STATUS_X_OPENCTI_WO.description: Workflow ID to set on imported reports.
